stories.title: Fresh color palette + font loading foundation
acceptanceCriteria: globals.css uses a fresh LIGHT palette: white (#FFFFFF) base, light gray (#F8FAFC/#F1F5F9), warm accent instead of dark navy backgrounds
Dark navy (#0A1628) is NOT used as any section background color (only allowed for text)
next/font/google loads Inter and Plus Jakarta Sans (or equivalent premium fonts) in layout.tsx
Font variables are applied to html/body via className
Build passes with zero TypeScript errors

stories.title: Header and Footer redesign — light, clean, minimal
acceptanceCriteria: Header has light/white background, clean navigation, working language switcher
Footer uses subtle dark (not pitch black) background with refined typography
Mobile hamburger menu works and matches new palette
Both components use the loaded fonts (not system fallbacks)
No dark navy (#0A1628) backgrounds on header

stories.title: Hero section with image carousel — bright, aspirational
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage hero has an auto-rotating image carousel with 4-6 high-quality property/architecture images
Carousel transitions are smooth (fade or slide, 5-8 second intervals)
Hero is BRIGHT and aspirational — NOT dark overlay dominated
Search bar is overlaid on hero with glassmorphism or clean white card styling
Hero text (title + subtitle) is readable over carousel images
Responsive: carousel works on mobile without layout shift

stories.title: PropertyCard redesign — clean minimal with real images
acceptanceCriteria: PropertyCard uses real scraped property images (from data layer), NOT gray placeholder boxes
Card has generous padding, rounded corners (xl or 2xl), subtle shadow on hover
Price, title, location, bed/bath/sqm stats are clearly readable
Hover animation: subtle lift + shadow increase
Consistent aspect ratio for card images (4:3 or 16:10)
Card matches the fresh light palette (white card on light gray background)

stories.title: Homepage full redesign — featured, locations, stats
acceptanceCriteria: Featured listings section shows real property data with redesigned PropertyCards
Location grid uses attractive images with clean overlay text (not heavy gradient)
Stats bar section uses the new palette (not dark navy background)
All sections have consistent spacing (generous, Dot Property-level white space)
Page flows naturally from hero → featured → locations → stats

stories.title: Search page — spacious layout with clean filters
acceptanceCriteria: Search results grid has generous spacing between cards
Filter sidebar uses the new light palette (no dark backgrounds)
Sort dropdown and result count are cleanly styled
Mobile: filters accessible via clean slide-out drawer
Empty state and loading skeleton match new design

stories.title: Property detail page — luxury treatment
acceptanceCriteria: Image gallery is large, prominent, with smooth thumbnail navigation
Property info section has elegant typography and generous spacing
Agent contact card is clean and professional (not heavy/dark)
Similar listings section uses redesigned PropertyCards
Overall feel matches luxury real estate brand aesthetic

stories.title: Section and profile pages refresh
acceptanceCriteria: Sale, Rent, Projects pages use the new light palette (no dark navy hero backgrounds)
Section hero areas are clean and minimal (light background or subtle gradient)
Agent and Developer profile pages match the new palette
Map placeholder page matches the new design
All loading.tsx and error.tsx files match the new palette
